parts.answer: The only correct answer is D (rate decreases and yield increases) A is incorrect because a decrease in temperature would decrease the rate but increase the yield B is incorrect because a decrease in temperature would decrease the rate C is incorrect because a decrease in temperature would increase the yield (1) Computer Number Answer Mark

The only correct answer is B (rate increases and yield increases) A is incorrect because an increase in pressure would increase the yield (1) Computer C is incorrect because an increase in pressure would increase the rate and increase the yield D is incorrect because an increase in pressure would increase the rate Number Answer Mark The only correct answer is C (the mixture becomes more yellow) A is incorrect because the position of equilibrium would change B is incorrect because coloured ions would still be present D is incorrect because the removal of the hydrogen ions would move the position of equilibrium to the left (1) Computer Number Answer Mark

The only correct answer is A (1-methylcyclopentanol) B is incorrect because 2-methylcyclopentanol is a secondary alcohol C is incorrect because 2-methylbutan-1-ol is a primary alcohol D is incorrect because 3-methylpentan-2-ol is a secondary alcohol (1) Computer Number Answer Mark

The only correct answer is C (phosphorus(V) chloride) A is incorrect because acidified aqueous potassium dichromate(VI) does not oxidise tertiary alcohols B is incorrect because bromine water does not react with alcohols D is incorrect because sodium carbonate solution does not react with alcohols (1) Computer Number Answer Mark
